hyperedges.label: Client-Side AI Feature Flow
hyperedges.note: Both AI features (invoice scanner and monthly advisor) share the same pattern: read financial state from biz_v10, build a Hebrew prompt, POST to the Anthropic Claude API, and display the response in the Tools tab. This three-way shared flow justifies a hyperedge.

hyperedges.label: Home Quick-Stats Aggregation Flow
hyperedges.note: loadHomeQuickStats is the single cross-module read that pulls data from three independent datastores (calculator, calendar, tasks) and merges them into one UI strip. This multi-source aggregation pattern uniquely connects all four nodes.

hyperedges.label: User Data Lifecycle (Auth + Namespace + Persistence)
hyperedges.note: These five nodes collectively own the full user-data lifecycle: credentials stored unnamespaced in biz_pin_v1, namespace proxy activated on login, and export/import providing full backup/restore of all namespaced keys. No other nodes participate in all three lifecycle phases.

nodes.label: App Shell (HTML Document)
nodes.description: Single-page application root containing four embedded sub-apps (calculator, calendar, tasks, home), all CSS, and all JS inline. Acts as the top-level container and bootstrap context.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – the file itself is the module boundary; all code co-exists in one HTML document

nodes.label: Auth Module
nodes.description: Login/register system with demo-user shortcut. Manages user session, exports/imports per-user data as JSON blobs, and controls which user namespace is active for localStorage keys.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – #biz-auth-screen section with dedicated bizLogin/bizRegister/bizLogout functions

nodes.label: Namespace Proxy IIFE
nodes.description: IIFE that monkey-patches localStorage to prefix every key with the active user ID, so multiple users can share the same browser without data collisions. Exposes window._bizLS for raw unnamespaced access.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – explicit IIFE pattern with bizNsProxy() wrapping getItem/setItem/removeItem

nodes.label: Calculator Module
nodes.description: Core profit/loss calculator with income rows, expense rows, fixed tax deductions (income-tax, VAT, national-insurance), snapshot history, planning tools, Chart.js analytics, and AI-powered invoice scanning and monthly advisor. State key SK='biz_v10'.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – largest JS block in the file, lines ~3926–5803, defines SK, SNAPK, expenseRows, fixedDefs, etc.

nodes.label: Home Screen IIFE
nodes.description: IIFE managing the home/dashboard screen: business name, logo (text or uploaded image), tagline, dark-mode toggle, emoji picker for logo, quick-stats bar pulling live data from the calculator module, and FAB (floating action button) configuration.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – var _HOME_SK='home_v1', homeState object and homeApplyState/openSettings defined in dedicated IIFE block starting ~line 5831

nodes.label: App Manager Module
nodes.description: Manages the registry of apps (built-in + user-defined). Persists app order/visibility in localStorage. Renders the app-manager overlay and provides launchApp() to navigate between sub-apps.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – appsRegistry, APP_REG_KEY='home_apps_v1', BUILTIN_APPS array, loadAppsRegistry/saveAppsRegistry/renderAppManager/launchApp at line ~6133

nodes.label: Calendar Module
nodes.description: Full calendar with month/week views, event CRUD (meetings, tasks, notes, reminders), recurrence, client and revenue tracking per event, mini-calendar widget, and upcoming-events panel. Storage key CAL_SK='biz_cal_v2'.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – CAL_SK, CAL_EVS, cSave/cLoad/cDraw/cDrawMonth/cDrawWeek defined at line ~6208+

nodes.label: Tasks Module
nodes.description: Kanban/list task manager with quick-add bar, filter bar, stats row, settings overlay, and a modal for editing task details. Supports list and kanban board views. Storage key 'biz_tasks_v3'.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – #app-tasks HTML section with tk-* classes and tkQaAdd/tkFilter/tkToggleKanban/tkOpenSettings functions

nodes.label: Auth Screen UI
nodes.description: Login and registration form shown before any app is accessible. Contains email/password fields, submit button, demo-login shortcut, and user-menu panel (export/import data, logout).

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – #biz-auth-screen div with explicit form elements in HTML

nodes.label: Home Screen UI
nodes.description: Dashboard landing page showing business name/logo, tagline, quick-stats strip (revenue, profit, today events, open tasks), app-launcher grid, and FAB for quick calculator access.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – #app-home section rendered by home IIFE

nodes.label: Calculator Screen UI
nodes.description: Multi-tab calculator interface: Income tab, Expenses tab, Analysis tab (Chart.js charts), Planning tab, Snapshots tab, and Tools tab (invoice scanner, meeting timer, pricing calculator, ROAS/CAC tools).

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – #app-calc section with tab buttons and sub-panels in HTML

nodes.label: Calendar Screen UI
nodes.description: Calendar interface with toolbar (prev/next/today, month/week toggle), main calendar grid, mini-calendar sidebar, upcoming-events list, and event-detail modal.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – #app-cal section in HTML

nodes.label: Tasks Screen UI
nodes.description: Task manager interface with quick-add input bar, filter controls, stats summary row, task list/kanban toggle, kanban columns wrapper, and task-detail modal overlay.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – #app-tasks section with tk-* child divs in HTML

nodes.label: bizSubmitAuth()
nodes.description: Entry-point for the auth form submission. Delegates to bizLogin() or bizRegister() depending on current mode. Validates inputs and triggers namespace proxy reconfiguration on success.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – onclick handler on the auth form submit button

nodes.label: bizLogin()
nodes.description: Authenticates an existing user by checking stored PIN/credentials in localStorage, activates the user namespace in the proxy, then loads the home screen.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – defined in auth module, referenced in HTML and summary

nodes.label: bizRegister()
nodes.description: Creates a new user account: stores hashed credentials in localStorage under biz_pin_v1, initialises user namespace in the proxy, and navigates to home screen.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – defined in auth module

nodes.label: bizLogout()
nodes.description: Clears the active user session from memory, resets the namespace proxy, and returns to the auth screen.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – referenced in user-menu HTML

nodes.label: bizExportUserData()
nodes.description: Serialises all namespaced localStorage keys for the active user into a JSON blob and triggers a browser file download.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – referenced in user-menu HTML export button

nodes.label: bizImportUserData()
nodes.description: Reads a previously exported JSON blob via file-input, merges all keys back into namespaced localStorage, and reloads the active app state.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – referenced in user-menu HTML import button

nodes.label: calc()
nodes.description: Core calculation function. Reads all income and expense rows, applies Israeli tax brackets (calcIsraeliTax / calcIsraeliBI), computes net profit, updates summary UI, and triggers chart re-render. Monkey-patched by the namespace-proxy layer.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – global function in calculator module, monkey-patched pattern with _origCalc saved

nodes.label: calcIsraeliTax()
nodes.description: Computes Israeli income-tax (mas hakhnasa) for a given annual net income using the statutory progressive bracket table.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – referenced explicitly in calc() and summary

nodes.label: calcIsraeliBI()
nodes.description: Computes Israeli national-insurance (Bituach Leumi) contributions using the statutory percentage schedule.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – referenced in calc() and summary

nodes.label: addExpense()
nodes.description: Appends a new expense row to the expenseRows array and re-renders the expense table. Monkey-patched to also trigger saveState() on change.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – listed in monkey-patching pattern summary

nodes.label: saveState()
nodes.description: Serialises the current calculator state (income rows, expense rows, settings, forex rates) via buildStateObj() and writes it to localStorage key SK ('biz_v10').

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – part of calculator persistence flow

nodes.label: applyState()
nodes.description: Reads the persisted state from localStorage and restores UI: populates income/expense rows, sets currency selectors, etc. Monkey-patched version runs after the original to handle extended fields.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – monkey-patched, reads SK='biz_v10'

nodes.label: captureState()
nodes.description: Returns a deep snapshot of the current calculator state as a plain object, used as the payload stored in each snapshot record.

attributes.rationale: INFERRED – referenced in snapshot structure {data: captureState()}

nodes.label: confirmSaveSnap()
nodes.description: Prompts the user for a snapshot label/note, then calls captureState(), wraps it in a snapshot object {id, label, note, date, ts, data}, pushes to the snapshots array, and writes to SNAPK ('biz_snaps_v6').

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – part of snapshot workflow in calculator module

nodes.label: renderSnapList()
nodes.description: Renders the list of saved snapshots in the Snapshots tab, with load/delete actions per row. Monkey-patched to add extra metadata display.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – monkey-patched, listed in summary

nodes.label: renderAnalysis()
nodes.description: Builds or updates all Chart.js charts in the Analysis tab: income vs expenses bar chart, profit trend line, expense breakdown doughnut, and any DS-specific charts. Monkey-patched.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – monkey-patched, calls Chart.js

nodes.label: renderPlanning()
nodes.description: Renders the Planning tab: goal-setting inputs, break-even calculation, projected profit scenarios, and what-if sliders.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – referenced in calculator module summary

nodes.label: switchTab()
nodes.description: Handles tab navigation within the calculator screen. Shows the selected tab panel, hides others, updates active tab button style. Monkey-patched.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – monkey-patched, controls #app-calc tabs

nodes.label: scanInvoice()
nodes.description: Accepts an invoice image upload from the user, encodes it as base64, and sends it to the Anthropic Claude API (claude-sonnet-4-20250514) with a Hebrew prompt to extract line-items, amounts, and VAT. Populates expense rows with the parsed result.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – calls Anthropic API directly from client JS

nodes.label: runMonthlyAdvisor()
nodes.description: Builds a financial summary prompt from the current calculator state and sends it to the Anthropic Claude API to receive personalised Hebrew-language monthly business advice. Displays the response in the Tools tab.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – calls Anthropic API, referenced in file read summary

nodes.label: exportAllCSV()
nodes.description: Exports all income and expense rows as a CSV file download for spreadsheet use.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – referenced in calculator module

nodes.label: exportAccountant()
nodes.description: Generates an accountant-ready report (PDF or structured text) summarising income, expenses, tax deductions, and net profit for the current period.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – referenced in calculator module

nodes.label: calcROAS()
nodes.description: Calculates Return on Ad Spend from user-entered advertising cost and revenue inputs in the Tools tab.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – listed in marketing-metrics helpers in calculator module

nodes.label: calcCAC()
nodes.description: Calculates Customer Acquisition Cost from ad spend and new-customer count inputs.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – listed alongside calcROAS in Tools tab

nodes.label: calcCashFlow()
nodes.description: Projects cash-flow timeline based on income schedule and expense payment dates entered in the planning section.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – referenced in calculator module planning functions

nodes.label: openApp()
nodes.description: Navigation function that hides all app screens and shows the requested sub-app (#app-home, #app-calc, #app-cal, #app-tasks). Delegates to launchApp() in the app manager.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – defined at end of calculator module, calls launchApp

nodes.label: goHome()
nodes.description: Convenience wrapper around openApp() that navigates specifically to the home screen and refreshes the quick-stats bar.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – defined alongside openApp in the file

nodes.label: cSaveModal()
nodes.description: Saves a new or edited calendar event from the modal form. Validates required fields, merges changes into the CAL_EVS array, calls cSave() to persist, then re-renders the calendar view.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – onclick='cSaveModal()' on modal Save button in calendar HTML

nodes.label: cDraw()
nodes.description: Top-level calendar render dispatcher: calls cDrawMonth() or cDrawWeek() based on C_VIEW, and refreshes mini-calendar and upcoming-events panel.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – defined in calendar module

nodes.label: tkDrawKanban()
nodes.description: Renders the kanban board view for tasks: creates column elements for each status (todo, in-progress, done), populates task cards, and wires drag-and-drop handlers.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – referenced in #app-tasks HTML (tkToggleKanban calls this) and summary

nodes.label: homeApplyState()
nodes.description: Reads homeState from localStorage ('home_v1') and applies all settings to the home screen DOM: business name, logo, tagline, dark-mode class, FAB configuration.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – defined in home IIFE, reads _HOME_SK

nodes.label: loadHomeQuickStats()
nodes.description: Reads the latest calculator state and calendar/tasks data to populate the home screen's quick-stats strip (monthly revenue, profit, today's events, open task count).

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – defined in home IIFE, cross-module data reader

nodes.label: launchApp()
nodes.description: App manager function that looks up the requested app in appsRegistry, hides all screens, shows the target screen div, and fires any per-app onLoad hooks.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – defined in app manager module at line ~6133

nodes.label: Main Calc State (biz_v10)
nodes.description: Primary localStorage key holding the serialised calculator state: income rows, expense rows, currency, fixed-deduction percentages, forex rates, and UI preferences.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – SK='biz_v10' constant in calculator module

nodes.label: Snapshots Store (biz_snaps_v6)
nodes.description: localStorage key storing an array of snapshot objects {id, label, note, date, ts, data} capturing historical calculator states.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – SNAPK='biz_snaps_v6' constant

nodes.label: Home State (home_v1)
nodes.description: localStorage key holding the home-screen configuration: businessName, logo, tagline, calcLabel, dark, fabLabel, fabSize, fabPosition, fabBg, userName, logoImage, logoBg.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – _HOME_SK='home_v1' in home IIFE

nodes.label: Calendar Events (biz_cal_v2)
nodes.description: localStorage key storing an array of calendar event objects {id, type, title, date, start, end, recur, color, client, status, travel, video, revenue, notes, done}.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – CAL_SK='biz_cal_v2' constant

nodes.label: Tasks Store (biz_tasks_v3)
nodes.description: localStorage key storing the tasks array with status, priority, due-date, and kanban column for each task.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – referenced in DATA_KEYS array in namespace proxy IIFE

nodes.label: Apps Registry (home_apps_v1)
nodes.description: localStorage key storing the app registry: ordering, visibility flags, and any user-added custom apps beyond BUILTIN_APPS.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – APP_REG_KEY='home_apps_v1' in app manager module

nodes.label: User Credentials (biz_pin_v1)
nodes.description: localStorage key (unnamespaced) storing user account credentials/PIN for login verification.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – referenced in auth module summary as storage_key

nodes.label: Digital Sales State (biz_ds_v1)
nodes.description: localStorage key for digital-sales product configuration used by calcDSProduct() and ROAS/CAC tools.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – 'biz_ds_v1' in DATA_KEYS and storage_keys of calculator module

nodes.label: Anthropic Claude API
nodes.description: External Anthropic Messages API endpoint called client-side for invoice OCR scanning and monthly advisor features. Uses model claude-sonnet-4-20250514.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – direct fetch() calls to Anthropic API in scanInvoice and runMonthlyAdvisor

nodes.label: Frankfurter Forex API
nodes.description: External Frankfurter.app API called to fetch live forex exchange rates for multi-currency income/expense support in the calculator.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – Frankfurter API referenced in calculator module for live forex rates

nodes.label: Chart.js Library
nodes.description: Chart.js 4.4.1 loaded from CDN, used by renderAnalysis() to draw bar, line, and doughnut charts in the Analysis tab.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – Chart.js 4.4.1 referenced in calculator module attributes

nodes.label: Monkey-Patching Pattern
nodes.description: Architectural pattern used throughout: original functions are saved as _orig* variables, then the global name is reassigned to a wrapper that calls the original plus extended logic. Used for calc, applyState, addExpense, renderSnapList, renderAnalysis, switchTab, buildStateObj.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – explicitly identified in multiple function definitions

nodes.label: User Namespace Isolation
nodes.description: All localStorage keys are prefixed with the active user's ID via the namespace proxy IIFE, allowing multiple users to share one browser without data interference.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – bizNsProxy() IIFE wraps localStorage globally

nodes.label: Israeli Tax Calculation
nodes.description: Domain-specific feature computing Israeli income-tax (mas hakhnasa) and national-insurance (Bituach Leumi) using statutory progressive brackets, applied to freelancer/small-business net profit.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – calcIsraeliTax and calcIsraeliBI explicitly identified

nodes.label: PWA Support
nodes.description: Progressive Web App manifest embedded as a data URI in the HTML head, enabling installation on mobile/desktop home screens with offline capability via the single-file architecture.

attributes.rationale: EXTRACTED – PWA manifest embedded as data-URI in app shell

links.note: Auth screen HTML and JS are embedded in the single HTML file
Namespace proxy IIFE is defined inside the HTML script block
PWA manifest embedded as data-URI in <head>
Auth must complete before calculator state is loaded for the active user
Auth activates the user namespace in the proxy
Proxy prefixes all localStorage access including SK keys
Login must activate the namespace proxy with the authenticated user ID
Export reads all namespaced keys, which requires the proxy enumeration
Fetches live exchange rates for multi-currency support
Home screen app-launcher grid is powered by appsRegistry from app manager
Both manage time-based work items (events vs tasks) and share the quick-stats aggregation in loadHomeQuickStats
Symmetric backup/restore pair operating on the same user data namespace
Symmetric persist/restore pair for the same calculator state object
After saving a snapshot, renderSnapList is called to refresh the UI
Both features call the same Anthropic Claude API from client JS for AI-assisted financial tasks
Advisor builds prompt from current financial state which must come from saved state
Both export financial data for external use; differ in format and audience
Both are marketing-efficiency metrics computed from ad spend; conceptually paired in the Tools tab
Navigating home refreshes the stats strip

hyperedges.label: Client-Side AI Feature Flow
hyperedges.note: Both AI features (invoice scanner and monthly advisor) share the same pattern: read financial state from biz_v10, build a Hebrew prompt, POST to the Anthropic Claude API, and display the response in the Tools tab. This three-way shared flow justifies a hyperedge.

hyperedges.label: Home Quick-Stats Aggregation Flow
hyperedges.note: loadHomeQuickStats is the single cross-module read that pulls data from three independent datastores (calculator, calendar, tasks) and merges them into one UI strip. This multi-source aggregation pattern uniquely connects all four nodes.

hyperedges.label: User Data Lifecycle (Auth + Namespace + Persistence)
hyperedges.note: These five nodes collectively own the full user-data lifecycle: credentials stored unnamespaced in biz_pin_v1, namespace proxy activated on login, and export/import providing full backup/restore of all namespaced keys. No other nodes participate in all three lifecycle phases.
